compatible_devices.compatible_series: FC series, FC-E series, SP series, TS series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD monitoring, PPFD auto-mode, sunrise/sunset simulation, custom schedule, dimming 0-100%
compatible_devices.notes: 2024+ smart versions with USB dimmer port required; older FC/FC-E/TS with manual-only dimmer knob are not compatible; one iConnectu per light unit; multiple lights manageable via MarsPro app grouping; RJ12 expansion port enables ecosystem connectivity

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: iFresh MarsPro Add-On Pack (includes iConnectu + temperature sensor)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature/humidity auto mode (25% default, auto-adjusts at trigger point), wind speed adjustment 25-100%, timer, cycle mode
compatible_devices.notes: iConnectu plugs into iFresh fan's RJ12 expansion port; Add-On Pack bundles iConnectu + temperature sensor for environmental automation; no third-party EC fan support; only Mars Hydro iFresh fans confirmed

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PPFD sensor, CO2 sensor, soil sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: PPFD, CO2, and soil monitoring to enable environmental automation for connected lights and fans
compatible_devices.notes: Sensors are optional add-ons, not included with base iConnectu; temperature sensor included in iFresh MarsPro Add-On Pack; enables richer automation triggers
